should_fix.change_summary: Added 'Implementation Note: Nested Scroll Behavior' subsection under overflow fix strategy, explaining that mainContainer scroll activates due to paddingBottom exceeding flex-1 allocation, and that child component internal scrolling continues to work as expected

nice_to_have.change_summary: Added 3 items to manual QA checklist: landscape orientation (with note that ~130px padding is ~36% of landscape viewport), tablet bottom padding check, and Android split-screen mode testing
Updated info tab impact description from 'low: content quantity is small' to 'low: relies on main container overflow-y-auto for scroll, content currently fits viewport'

review_history_entries_added: Stage 7 影響範囲レビュー2回目 (2026-03-27)
